aboutus.title: About Us
aboutus.description: At Jematell Homes, our mission is to bring your vision to life by constructing homes that blend innovative design, functionality, and comfort. We understand that your home is a reflection of your lifestyle and aspirations, and we strive to create spaces that perfectly suit your needs while maintaining the highest standards of construction.

blocks.text: Our Mission

At Jematell Homes, our mission is to bring your vision to life by constructing homes that blend innovative design, functionality, and comfort. We understand that your home is a reflection of your lifestyle and we strive to create spaces that perfectly suit your needs while maintaining the highest standards of construction.
Our Approach

We believe that building a home is a collaborative process, and we work closely with our clients to ensure every detail is carefully planned and executed. From the initial concept to the final finishing touches, we involve you in every step of the journey, valuing your input and ideas. Our team of skilled architects, designers, and craftsmen combines their expertise with your vision to create a truly personalized home that exceeds your expectations.
Customer Satisfaction

We value the trust and confidence you place in us, and we are dedicated to your complete satisfaction. We believe in open and transparent communication, providing regular updates throughout the construction process, and addressing any concerns promptly. Our goal is to not only meet but exceed your expectations, ensuring that you have a positive and stress-free experience from start to finish.
Experience the Difference

Choosing Jematell Homes means choosing a home builder that is dedicated to creating exceptional homes tailored to your unique preferences. We are passionate about what we do, and our commitment to quality, integrity, and client satisfaction sets us apart.
Contact us today to discuss your home building needs and let us guide you on the journey to creating the home you've always dreamed of.
LETS BUILD YOUR DREAM HOME

apache-junction.title: Custom Home Builder in Apache Junction, AZ
apache-junction.description: Build your custom home in Apache Junction, AZ with Jematell Homes. Expert design, desert craftsmanship, and a personalized building experience from start to finish.

blocks.text: APACHE JUNCTION
BUILD A HOME IN APACHE JUNCTION

Apache Junction, offers a unique blend of rugged desert beauty, wide-open spaces, and a relaxed, scenic lifestyle at the base of the Superstition Mountains. Known for its striking views, spacious properties, and close connection to nature, Apache Junction attracts homeowners seeking tranquility, privacy, and a true Arizona feel while still being within reach of the greater Phoenix area. Jematell Homes brings a personalized, family-owned approach to custom home building in Apache Junction, combining thoughtful design, quality craftsmanship, and hands-on project management to create homes that harmonize with both your lifestyle and the surrounding Sonoran Desert landscape.
Full-Service Design & Project Management

Building In Apache Junction

Jematell Homes brings a personalized, family-owned approach to custom home building in Apache Junction. With larger lots, sweeping desert views, and the Superstition Mountains as your backdrop, this area offers the opportunity to design a home that fully reflects your lifestyle. From initial concept through final finishes, our team focuses on thoughtful design, quality materials, and craftsmanship that stands the test of time in Arizona’s desert climate.
Custom home building in Apache Junction means creating a space that works with the land, the views, and your long-term vision.
Construction In Apache Junction

We manage Apache Junction’s permitting process and zoning requirements to ensure a smooth, efficient build. Our familiarity with local codes and site preparation requirements helps prevent delays and keeps your project fully compliant from start to finish.
From groundbreaking to final walkthrough, we provide clear communication, accurate scheduling, and uncompromising quality throughout the build.
Activities In Apache Junction

Apache Junction is known for its outdoor lifestyle and natural beauty. Residents enjoy hiking in Lost Dutchman State Park, exploring the Superstition Mountains, boating on Canyon Lake, and driving the scenic Apache Trail.
With easy access to Mesa and the greater Phoenix area, homeowners enjoy peaceful desert living while remaining connected to dining, shopping, and entertainment throughout the East Valley.
Education In Apache Junction

Apache Junction is served by the Apache Junction Unified School District, along with nearby charter and private school options in the surrounding East Valley communities. Families also benefit from proximity to higher education institutions in Mesa and the Phoenix metro area.
The city’s smaller-town atmosphere, combined with access to regional educational resources, makes it an appealing place for families planning to build and grow.

build-on-your-lot.title: Build On Your Lot
build-on-your-lot.description: Already own land or planning to purchase a homesite? Building on your own lot gives you the freedom to create a home that fits your lifestyle, your vision, and your future. We make the process simple, transparent, and enjoyable - from your first consultation to move-in day.

blocks.text: BUILD ON YOUR LOT
Turn Your Land Into Your Dream Home

Already own land or planning to purchase a homesite? Building on your own lot gives you the freedom to create a home that fits your lifestyle, your vision, and your future. We bring extensive experience building homes of all sizes across the Valley, from straightforward homesites to highly complex, custom builds. No two lots are the same, and we’re well-versed in navigating challenges like grading, utilities, access, and local regulations. We make the process simple, transparent, and enjoyable, from your first consultation to move-in day.
Why Choose Us?
1. We Specialize in On-Your-Lot Building
Building on your own land comes with unique challenges - zoning, utilities, site prep, and more. We have the experience to navigate it all smoothly, so you don’t have to.
2. End-to-End Guidance
From evaluating your lot to handing you the keys, we guide you every step of the way. Our team helps with:
Site evaluation and feasibility
Floor plan selection and customization
Permits and approvals
Budget planning and financing guidance
Construction and project management
3. Transparent Pricing
No surprises. We provide clear, upfront pricing and detailed breakdowns so you know exactly what to expect.
4. Fully Customizable Homes
Choose from our proven floor plans or create something entirely your own. Every home is tailored to fit your land and your lifestyle.
5. Quality Craftsmanship
We build homes that last. Our trusted construction team uses high-quality materials and proven building practices to ensure durability and long-term value.
6. Local Expertise
We understand local regulations, soil conditions, and permitting processes. This saves you time, money, and headaches.
7. A Smooth, Stress-Free Process
Building a home doesn’t have to be overwhelming. We’ve refined our process to keep things organized, efficient, and enjoyable.
Our Build-On-Your-Lot Process
Step 1: Initial Consultation
We discuss your vision, budget, timeline, and land (or land goals).
Step 2: Lot Evaluation
We assess your property for utilities, access, grading, and build feasibility.
Step 3: Design & Planning
Select and customize your floor plan, finishes, and features.
Step 4: Permits & Preparation
We handle permitting, engineering, and site preparation.
Step 5: Construction
Watch your home come to life with regular updates and communication.
Step 6: Move-In
Walk through your completed home and get the keys to your future.
Explore Floor Plans
Every home begins with the floor plan. Browse various styles, sizes, and configurations to find the perfect foundation for your vision.

buy-a-lot-with-us.title: Buy A Lot With Us
buy-a-lot-with-us.description: Buying the right piece of land is one of the most important steps in building your dream home - and it’s not always as simple as it seems. With our expertise in both real estate and home building, we help you find, evaluate, and purchase a lot with confidence.

blocks.text: BUY A LOT WITH US
Find the Perfect Homesite With Confidence

Buying the right piece of land is one of the most important steps in building your dream home, and it’s not always as simple as it seems. With our expertise in both real estate and home building, we help you find, evaluate, and purchase a lot with confidence. As licensed real estate agents, we can actively search for and source land opportunities that fit your goals, budget, and preferred location. Whether you’re looking for something turnkey or a more unique homesite, we guide you every step of the way.

blocks.alt: Luxury home interior featuring floor-to-ceiling windows and abundant natural light

blocks.text: Why Work With Us?
Licensed Agents + Builder Expertise
We’re not just agents-we’re builders. That means we evaluate land differently, with a deep understanding of what it takes to actually build on it.
Smarter Lot Selection
We help you avoid costly mistakes by identifying potential issues early, including:
Site access and usability
Utilities and infrastructure
Grading and drainage challenges
Zoning and building restrictions
Full Support Through Purchase
From identifying the right property to writing and negotiating your offer, we’re with you through the entire purchase process.
Due Diligence From a Builder’s Perspective
Not all lots are created equal. We go beyond the typical real estate evaluation by analyzing each property through the lens of a home builder.
Our due diligence process helps you understand:
What it will take to build on the lot
Potential site development costs
Timeline considerations
Any red flags before you buy
This ensures you’re making a smart investment - not just buying land, but buying the right land.
Start Your Search Today
Whether you already have an area in mind or are just beginning your search, we’re here to help you find the perfect lot and move forward with confidence.

carefree.title: Custom Home Builder in Carefree, AZ
carefree.description: Build your custom home in Carefree, AZ with Jematell Homes. Expert design, desert craftsmanship, and a personalized building experience from start to finish.

blocks.text: CAREFREE
BUILD A HOME IN CAREFREE

Carefree, Arizona offers upscale desert living with expansive views, quiet neighborhoods, and a refined atmosphere just north of Scottsdale. Known for its scenic beauty, custom estates, and proximity to Cave Creek, Carefree attracts homeowners seeking privacy, architectural distinction, and long-term value. Jematell Homes brings a personalized, family-owned approach to custom home building in Carefree, combining thoughtful design, quality craftsmanship, and hands-on project management to create homes that complement both your lifestyle and the surrounding Sonoran Desert landscape.
Full-Service Design & Project Management

Building In Carefree

Building in Carefree means designing a home that embraces panoramic desert views, natural terrain, and spacious surroundings. Jematell Homes specializes in crafting custom residences that blend modern comfort with timeless desert architecture. From initial design consultation to final finishes, we focus on detail, quality materials, and a smooth building experience tailored to your vision.
Carefree offers the opportunity to build with intention, privacy, and long-term value in one of Arizona’s most distinctive desert communities.
Construction In Carefree

Custom construction in Carefree requires thoughtful site planning, attention to elevation changes, and experience navigating local regulations. Jematell Homes manages every phase of the process with precision and transparency, coordinating directly with the town’s permitting requirements and working within established planning and zoning guidelines.
Our team ensures your home is built efficiently, meets all municipal standards, and performs beautifully in Arizona’s climate from foundation to final walkthrough.
Activities In Carefree

Carefree offers a peaceful desert lifestyle with access to art galleries, dining, golf, and outdoor recreation. Residents enjoy seasonal events and community gatherings at the Carefree Town Center while exploring attractions and experiences throughout the area.
With hiking trails, scenic desert landscapes, and proximity to Cave Creek and North Scottsdale, Carefree delivers both tranquility and accessibility..
Education In Carefree

Carefree families are served by the Cave Creek Unified School District, along with private and charter school options throughout the North Valley. Nearby colleges and universities in Scottsdale and Phoenix provide additional opportunities for higher education.
The area’s low-density setting combined with access to quality educational resources makes Carefree a strong choice for families planning their future.

blocks.text: CASA GRANDE
BUILD A HOME IN CASA GRANDE

Casa Grande, Arizona offers growing opportunity, open space, and convenient access between Phoenix and Tucson along the I-10 corridor. Known for its expanding residential communities, strong economic development, and affordable land compared to surrounding metro areas, Casa Grande attracts homeowners seeking value without sacrificing modern comfort. Jematell Homes brings a family-owned, hands-on approach to custom home building in Casa Grande, combining thoughtful design, quality craftsmanship, and full-service project management to create homes built for long-term durability in Arizona’s desert climate.

Construction In Casa Grande

Construction in Casa Grande requires attention to desert soil conditions, efficient project coordination, and familiarity with local permitting requirements. Jematell Homes manages each stage of the process with transparency and precision, from site preparation to final inspection.
Our streamlined build process keeps your project on schedule while maintaining the high standards of craftsmanship that define every Jematell home.
Activities In Casa Grande

Casa Grande offers a mix of outdoor recreation, local events, and community amenities. Residents enjoy golf courses, regional parks, and nearby hiking opportunities, along with shopping and dining throughout the city’s growing commercial areas.
Its central location provides easy travel to both Phoenix and Tucson, making it ideal for homeowners who value convenience alongside a quieter pace of living.
Education In Casa Grande

Casa Grande is served by the Casa Grande Union High School District, along with additional public, charter, and private school options throughout the area. Families benefit from a growing educational infrastructure that supports both academic development and extracurricular opportunities.
With continued community growth and access to higher education institutions such as Central Arizona College, Casa Grande provides a solid educational foundation for families building their future.

custom-homes.description: Learn About Building a Custom Home with Jematell Homes

blocks.text: CREATE YOUR DREAM HOME
CONFIDENCE AND EASE EVERY STEP OF THE WAY

At Jematell Homes, we specialize in designing and building custom homes that perfectly capture your unique vision and lifestyle. Our team collaborates with you every step of the way, ensuring your new home is not only stunning but also tailored to your exact needs. With our full-service project management, we take care of every aspect of the construction process, from initial design and planning to the final finishing touches.

OUR PROCESS
INTRODUCTION
Contact us via our contact form and we will reach out to you to learn more about your project's budget, timeline, and vision.
DESIGN
We will collaborate with our architect who will turn your ideas into plans, carefully refining every detail to bring your vision to life.
BUILD

COMPLETION
Your house is finished! We will do a thorough final walkthrough to address any final adjustments. You'll then receive the keys to your dream home.
LET’S MAKE YOUR DREAM A REALITY

Fountain Hills families are served by the Fountain Hills Unified School District, with additional charter and private school options available in surrounding communities. The area also offers convenient access to higher education institutions throughout the Scottsdale and Phoenix metro area.
The city’s safe, well-maintained environment and strong educational resources make it an appealing place to build and grow.

Our focus is on delivering excellence from the first consultation to the final walk-through, making your cherished moments possible. We offer both custom and spec home options to suit your needs. Welcome to Jematell Homes, where we turn your dream home into a reality.

phoenix.title: Custom Home Builder in Phoenix, AZ
phoenix.description: Build your custom home in Phoenix, AZ with Jematell Homes. Personalized design, expert craftsmanship, and a smooth building experience from start to finish.

blocks.text: PHOENIX
BUILD A HOME IN PHOENIX

Phoenix, Arizona offers a dynamic mix of established neighborhoods, growing residential communities, and convenient access to employment, dining, and entertainment throughout the Valley. From central urban infill lots to spacious suburban properties, Phoenix provides diverse opportunities for custom home building. Jematell Homes brings a family-owned, hands-on approach to custom home construction in Phoenix, combining thoughtful design, quality craftsmanship, and full-service project management to create homes tailored to your lifestyle and built for long-term performance in Arizona’s climate.
Full-Service Design & Project Management
Site Selection
Find the perfect location for your dream home
Material Selection
Choose quality materials for every detail
Funding
Navigate financing options with expert guidance

Rigorous quality checks throughout
Design
Collaborate with our architects on your vision
Weekly Updates

Permitting
Handle all permits and regulatory requirements
Building In Phoenix

Building in Phoenix means taking advantage of diverse neighborhoods, lot sizes, and architectural styles. Jematell Homes works closely with homeowners to design custom residences that maximize functionality, comfort, and long-term value.
Whether building on an infill lot in an established area or in a newer residential community, we tailor each home to fit both your property and your vision
Construction In Phoenix

Construction in Phoenix requires coordination with city permitting departments, zoning requirements, and site-specific conditions. Jematell Homes manages every phase of the build process with transparency and efficiency, ensuring compliance with local standards while maintaining exceptional craftsmanship.
From planning and permitting through final inspection, we focus on delivering homes built to perform in Arizona’s climate.
Activities In Phoenix

Phoenix offers year-round recreation, professional sports, cultural attractions, and outdoor adventure. Residents enjoy hiking trails, dining districts, entertainment venues, and convenient access to neighboring Scottsdale, Tempe, and Glendale.
The city’s mix of urban energy and desert surroundings makes it an ideal location for a custom home built around your lifestyle.
Education In Phoenix

Phoenix is served by multiple public school districts along with charter and private school options throughout the Valley. The city also offers access to higher education institutions, including Arizona State University and other regional colleges.
Families building in Phoenix benefit from a wide range of educational opportunities within a thriving metropolitan environment.

privacypolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacypolicy.description: Learn about Jematell Homes' privacy practices, how we protect your data, and your rights. Read our privacy policy for transparent information handling details.

blocks.text: Jematell Homes Privacy Policy

This privacy notice for Jematell Homes LLC ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"), describes how and why we might collect, store, use, and/or share ("process") your information when you use our services ("Services"), such as when you:
Visit our website at jematellhomes.com, or any website of ours that links to this privacy notice
Engage with us in other related ways, including any sales, marketing, or events

Questions or concerns? Reading this privacy notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services. If you still have any questions or concerns, please contact us at info@jematellhomes.com.
SUMMARY OF KEY POINTS

This summary provides key points from our privacy notice, but you can find out more details about any of these topics by clicking the link following each key point or by using our table of contents below to find the section you are looking for.

What personal information do we process? When you visit, use, or navigate our Services, we may process personal information depending on how you interact with Jematell Homes LLC and the Services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use. Learn more about personal information you disclose to us.
Do we process any sensitive personal information? We do not process sensitive personal information.
Do we receive any information from third parties? We do not receive any information from third parties.

How do we process your information? We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent. We process your information only when we have a valid legal reason to do so.
In what situations and with which parties do we share personal information? We may share information in specific situations and with specific third parties.

How do we keep your information safe? We have organizational and technical processes and procedures in place to protect your personal information. However, no electronic transmission over the internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure, so we cannot promise or guarantee that hackers, cybercriminals, or other unauthorized third parties will not be able to defeat our security and improperly collect, access, steal, or modify your information.
What are your rights? Depending on where you are located geographically, the applicable privacy law may mean you have certain rights regarding your personal information.

How do you exercise your rights? The easiest way to exercise your rights is by submitting a data subject access request, or by contacting us. We will consider and act upon any request in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
Want to learn more about what Jematell Homes LLC does with any information we collect? Review the privacy notice in full.
TABLE OF CONTENTS
1. WHAT INFORMATION DO WE COLLECT?
2. HOW DO WE PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?
3. WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?
4. HOW LONG DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION?
5. HOW DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION SAFE?
6. DO WE COLLECT INFORMATION FROM MINORS?
7. WHAT ARE YOUR PRIVACY RIGHTS?
8. CONTROLS FOR DO-NOT-TRACK FEATURES
9. DO CALIFORNIA RESIDENTS HAVE SPECIFIC PRIVACY RIGHTS?
10. DO WE MAKE UPDATES TO THIS NOTICE?
11. HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?
12. HOW CAN YOU REVIEW, UPDATE, OR DELETE THE DATA WE COLLECT FROM YOU?
Personal information you disclose to us
In Short: We collect personal information that you provide to us.

We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and Services, when you participate in activities on the Services, or otherwise when you contact us.

Personal Information Provided by You. The personal information that we collect depends on the context of your interactions with us and the Services, the choices you make, and the products and features you use. The personal information we collect may include the following:
names
phone numbers
email addresses
Sensitive Information. We do not process sensitive information.
All personal information that you provide to us must be true, complete, and accurate, and you must notify us of any changes to such personal information.

In Short: We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent.
We process your personal information for a variety of reasons, depending on how you interact with our Services, including:
To respond to user inquiries/offer support to users. We may process your information to respond to your inquiries and solve any potential issues you might have with the requested service.
In Short: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with the following third parties.
We may need to share your personal information in the following situations:

Business Transfers. We may share or transfer your information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business to another company.
In Short: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy notice unless otherwise required by law.

We will only keep your personal information for as long as it is necessary for the purposes set out in this privacy notice, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law (such as tax, accounting, or other legal requirements).

When we have no ongoing legitimate business need to process your personal information, we will either delete or anonymize such information, or, if this is not possible (for example, because your personal information has been stored in backup archives), then we will securely store your personal information and isolate it from any further processing until deletion is possible.
In Short: We aim to protect your personal information through a system of organizational and technical security measures.

We have implemented appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, despite our safeguards and efforts to secure your information, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure, so we cannot promise or guarantee that hackers, cybercriminals, or other unauthorized third parties will not be able to defeat our security and improperly collect, access, steal, or modify your information. Although we will do our best to protect your personal information, transmission of personal information to and from our Services is at your own risk. You should only access the Services within a secure environment.
In Short: We do not knowingly collect data from or market to children under 18 years of age.

We do not knowingly solicit data from or market to children under 18 years of age. By using the Services, you represent that you are at least 18 or that you are the parent or guardian of such a minor and consent to such minor dependent’s use of the Services. If we learn that personal information from users less than 18 years of age has been collected, we will deactivate the account and take reasonable measures to promptly delete such data from our records. If you become aware of any data we may have collected from children under age 18, please contact us at info@jematellhomes.com.

Withdrawing your consent: If we are relying on your consent to process your personal information, which may be express and/or implied consent depending on the applicable law, you have the right to withdraw your consent at any time. You can withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us by using the contact details provided in the section "HOW CAN YOU CONTACT US ABOUT THIS NOTICE?" below.

However, please note that this will not affect the lawfulness of the processing before its withdrawal nor, when applicable law allows, will it affect the processing of your personal information conducted in reliance on lawful processing grounds other than consent.
If you have questions or comments about your privacy rights, you may email us at info@jematellhomes.com.

Most web browsers and some mobile operating systems and mobile applications include a Do-Not-Track ("DNT") feature or setting you can activate to signal your privacy preference not to have data about your online browsing activities monitored and collected. At this stage no uniform technology standard for recognizing and implementing DNT signals has been finalized. As such, we do not currently respond to DNT browser signals or any other mechanism that automatically communicates your choice not to be tracked online. If a standard for online tracking is adopted that we must follow in the future, we will inform you about that practice in a revised version of this privacy notice.
In Short: Yes, if you are a resident of California, you are granted specific rights regarding access to your personal information.

California Civil Code Section 1798.83, also known as the "Shine The Light" law, permits our users who are California residents to request and obtain from us, once a year and free of charge, information about categories of personal information (if any) we disclosed to third parties for direct marketing purposes and the names and addresses of all third parties with which we shared personal information in the immediately preceding calendar year. If you are a California resident and would like to make such a request, please submit your request in writing to us using the contact information provided below.

If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with Services, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g., backups, etc.).
In Short: Yes, we will update this notice as necessary to stay compliant with relevant laws.

We may update this privacy notice from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by an updated "Revised" date and the updated version will be effective as soon as it is accessible. If we make material changes to this privacy notice, we may notify you either by prominently posting a notice of such changes or by directly sending you a notification. We encourage you to review this privacy notice frequently to be informed of how we are protecting your information.
If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may email us at info@jematellhomes.com or contact us by post at:
Jematell Homes LLC
8350 E Raintree Dr
Scottsdale, AZ 85260
United States
Based on the applicable laws of your country, you may have the right to request access to the personal information we collect from you, change that information, or delete it.

rio-verde.title: Custom Home Builder in Rio Verde, AZ
rio-verde.description: Build your custom home in Rio Verde, AZ with Jematell Homes. Personalized design, quality craftsmanship, and a smooth building process tailored to your lifestyle.

blocks.text: RIO VERDE
BUILD A HOME IN RIO VERDE

Rio Verde, Arizona offers a peaceful desert setting known for its golf communities, scenic mountain views, and low-density residential neighborhoods. Located east of Scottsdale, Rio Verde attracts homeowners seeking privacy, open space, and a quieter pace of life while remaining connected to the greater Phoenix area. Jematell Homes brings a family-owned, hands-on approach to custom home building in Rio Verde, combining thoughtful design, quality craftsmanship, and personalized project management to create homes built for comfort, durability, and long-term enjoyment.

blocks.alt: Modern luxury custom home in Scottsdale Arizona with clean lines, large windows, and desert landscape.

Building In Rio Verde

Building in Rio Verde means creating a home that complements expansive desert views and established golf course communities. Jematell Homes works closely with homeowners to design custom residences that maximize natural light, outdoor living space, and functional comfort.
Whether building within a golf community or on a private lot, we tailor every detail to reflect your lifestyle and long-term plans.
Construction In Rio Verde

Construction in Rio Verde requires thoughtful site planning, familiarity with local community guidelines, and attention to desert terrain conditions. Jematell Homes manages every stage of the build process with transparency and precision, ensuring compliance with municipal standards while maintaining exceptional craftsmanship.
From foundation through final walkthrough, we focus on delivering homes built for efficiency, durability, and lasting value.
Activities In Rio Verde

Rio Verde offers a relaxed lifestyle centered around golf, outdoor recreation, and community connection. Residents enjoy scenic desert landscapes, walking trails, and nearby access to Scottsdale’s dining and entertainment options.
The area’s peaceful environment and strong sense of community make it an ideal place to build a custom home designed for everyday comfort.
Education In Rio Verde

Rio Verde is served by nearby school districts in the greater Scottsdale and Fountain Hills areas, along with access to charter and private school options throughout the region. Higher education institutions in the Phoenix metro area provide additional opportunities for continued learning.
The area’s quiet residential setting combined with access to regional educational resources makes Rio Verde appealing for families and long-term homeowners alike.

blocks.text: RV Garages

We have the perfect solution for your recreational vehicles with our custom-designed RV garages. Our RV garages are carefully crafted to provide secure, weather-resistant storage for your prized motorhomes, travel trailers, and campers. With spacious interiors and durable construction, our RV garages offer the ideal shelter to keep your recreational vehicles safe from the elements, ensuring they remain in pristine condition for your next adventure. Explore our range of designs and features to find the perfect RV garage to complement your dream home.

scottsdale.title: Scottsdale
scottsdale.description: Jematell Homes is a premier custom home builder in Scottsdale, AZ, specializing in luxury homes designed around your lifestyle. From architectural planning to construction, we deliver exceptional craftsmanship, personalized design, and a smooth building experience.

blocks.text: SCOTTSDALE
BUILD A HOME IN SCOTTSDALE

Scottsdale, Arizona offers luxury living, stunning desert landscapes, and vibrant amenities. Known for upscale neighborhoods, golf courses, and year-round sunshine, Scottsdale is ideal for custom home building. Jematell Homes is a trusted Scottsdale home builder known for exceptional craftsmanship, personalized design, and deep local expertise. We deliver high-quality custom homes tailored to your lifestyle in premier Scottsdale neighborhoods.

blocks.alt: High-end custom home construction by an experienced Arizona home builder

Building In Scottsdale

Jematell Homes is a trusted luxury custom home builder in Scottsdale, AZ, known for exceptional craftsmanship and careful attention to detail. Our trusted construction approach and uncompromising quality are evident throughout our homes, from the first design concepts to the finest interior finishes.
Custom home building transforms your vision into reality. Jematell Homes manages the entire process, from design to construction, to deliver a home perfectly suited to your lifestyle.
Contruction In Scottsdale

We manage Scottsdale’s permitting process and zoning requirements to ensure a smooth, efficient build. Our familiarity with local codes and regulations helps prevent delays and keeps your project fully compliant from start to finish.

From groundbreaking to final walkthrough, we provide clear communication, accurate scheduling, and uncompromising quality. Our dedicated team keeps you informed and involved throughout the build, delivering your home on time and exactly as envisioned.
Activities In Scottsdale

Scottsdale offers a vibrant lifestyle filled with world-class attractions and family-friendly activities. Residents enjoy attending the PGA Tour’s Phoenix Open, championship golf courses, and premier shopping and dining at Scottsdale Quarter. Families can explore scenic desert trails, parks, museums, and interactive attractions like the McCormick-Stillman Railroad Park and OdySea Aquarium. With luxury resorts, outdoor recreation, and year-round events, Scottsdale provides something for every age and lifestyle.
Education In Scottsdale

Scottsdale offers exceptional educational opportunities for families at every stage. The Scottsdale Unified School District (SUSD) is highly regarded for its strong academic programs, extracurricular activities, and commitment to student success. Higher education options include Scottsdale Community College, known for its diverse programs and pathways to four-year universities. Families also benefit from a wide range of respected private and charter schools, providing flexible, high-quality education choices. With a strong focus on learning and achievement, Scottsdale is an ideal place to put down roots and grow.

where-we-build.title: Where We Build
where-we-build.description: Discover the areas where Jematell Homes builds custom homes.

blocks.text: FINDING THE RIGHT PLACE TO BUILD IS THE FIRST STEP TOWARD CREATING YOUR DREAM HOME

At the heart of every great home is an even greater location. We proudly build custom homes across a variety of communities around Arizona. Whether you already own land or are still searching for the perfect homesite, we help you build in a location that complements your lifestyle.

We build on private lots, in established neighborhoods, and in communities. Giving you the flexibility to create a home that fits both your vision and your surroundings. No matter the setting, our commitment remains the same: to craft a custom home that feels perfectly placed, thoughtfully designed, and built to last.
Wherever you choose to build, we’re here to help you find the right location and bring your dream home to life.

blocks.alt: Modern custom home in Scottsdale, AZ featuring clean architectural lines, large floor-to-ceiling windows, desert landscaping, and luxury new construction design by Jematell Homes
Spacious luxury living room with modern design, high ceilings
Elegant luxury master bedroom with plush bedding, soft lighting, and refined decor
Open concept luxury dining room with modern chandelier and upscale furnishings
A newly constructed single-story house with a gray tiled roof, white exterior walls, and a concrete driveway, situated in a desert landscape with mountains in the background.

blocks.text: BEGIN YOUR BUILD
Relax while we manage every detail, throughout the entire process.
